themes.title: Notification Performance
themes.description: Enhancing the speed and reliability of notification delivery.

themes.title: User Engagement
themes.description: Improving user interaction with notifications through preferences and feedback.

milestones.name: MVP - Notification Latency Reduction
milestones.description: Implement features to reduce notification delivery latency.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve a 50% reduction in notification delivery latency.

milestones.name: V1 - User Engagement Enhancements
milestones.description: Add user preference page and improve accessibility of the notification center.
milestones.success_criteria: Increase user satisfaction by 30% based on feedback.

milestones.name: V2 - Feedback and Metrics
milestones.description: Collect user feedback and enhance notification engagement metrics.
milestones.success_criteria: Collect feedback from at least 100 users and improve engagement metrics by 20%.

sequencing.reason: V1 requires successful implementation of MVP features to ensure a solid foundation for user engagement.
V2 builds on the user engagement enhancements made in V1 to effectively collect feedback and improve metrics.

mvp.goal: Establish a reliable notification delivery system.

v1.goal: Enhance user engagement through preferences and accessibility.

v2.goal: Gather user feedback and improve engagement metrics.
